name: Matcha

pros.title: one of the few misc foods with genuinely serious numbers on paper
pros.explanation: It is still a niche format, but the upside is real.

pros.title: context matters more than purity here
pros.explanation: This category is mostly about tradeoffs and use case.

pros.title: can sometimes be a better swap
pros.explanation: Replacement value matters in misc more than in cleaner categories.

cons.title: real serving sizes are far smaller than the label basis
cons.explanation: The paper profile is stronger than the lived one.

cons.title: rarely deserves foundation-food status
cons.explanation: Most misc items are situational rather than core.

cons.title: easy to oversell beyond the evidence
cons.explanation: This category attracts a lot of exaggeration.

sourceNotes: Values are approximate representative placeholders for ruleset tuning, not a clinical nutrient database.
